notes: New: the station auto-connects on startup and keeps the Bluetooth link up on its own (auto-reconnect retries faster if it drops). Added a one-tap Self-Check (Diagnostics > Run self-check, or 'selfcheck' on the console) that flags any problem - link, station, Wi-Fi, lab scheduler - in plain English with a suggested fix. Plus a short guided tutorial of the controls, shown once on first launch and replayable from Diagnostics > Show tutorial.
